name: Italian Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut 3-4 potatoes into quarters.
2. In a casserole dish, add the melted butter, oil, minced garlic, onions, and potatoes.
3. Stir the ingredients to combine.
4. Sprinkle parsley, crushed red peppers, Parmesan cheese, and salt over the top of the potatoes.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour, or until the potatoes are crispy.
